# Scout — find the gym that actually fits

> Scout is a gym-discovery platform (Tampa, FL beta, plus premium clubs across
> major US metros) with per-fact provenance: every amenity, machine, price, and
> parking note carries its source and confidence. Vibes are soft signals;
> equipment is ground truth.

## What Scout knows per gym
- Equipment to machine level (150+ types: racks w/ counts, dumbbell max,
  selectorized + plate-loaded machines, cardio, functional/strongman, Pilates
  reformers, combat bags, recovery gear), with brands
- Amenities (sauna, cold plunge, pool, childcare, café, co-working, tanning,
  women's-only areas, accessibility) with source labels
- Real pricing: day-pass / membership / class-pack, enrollment & annual fees,
  commitment terms & early-termination, plus guest-policy models (public day
  pass, members' guests only, members-only/waitlist) for premium clubs
- Parking intelligence (on-site lots, garages w/ validation notes, OSM-
  mapped options) + bike/transit access
- Hours with open-now, photo galleries from gyms' own sites, community
  reviews and visit logs
- Segments: strength, CrossFit, big-box, boutique, climbing, yoga/Pilates,
  MMA, recovery, luxury, cycling/spin, barre

## Key pages
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/ — explore gyms (list + Waypoint map)
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/gym/{slug} — full gym profiles
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/about — how the data verification ladder works
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/blog — guides grounded in our dataset

## Data honesty
Unknown facts say "unlisted" — Scout never invents details. Sources rank:
owner > scout-verified > user-confirmed > web data > curated > estimated.
